transcript: The girl cries and pulls out her phone, begging the woman across the room to take a picture. Once the picture was taken, then all her troubles would be gone. The woman was a bit overwhelmed, but she agreed to the girl's request. But who knew that the next moment, as soon as she pressed the shutter, the girl was gone. The woman was stunned. The horror of the scene was completely beyond her knowledge. She told her boyfriend what had happened, trying to get some help from him. Unfortunately, in the face of this ridiculous talk, her boyfriend didn't believe her at all. To show the effect, the woman took pictures of the surrounding area. But no more disappearing scenes appeared. The woman became anxious. She says it's probably the object. The camera only works with people. The more she talks, the more she gets out of line. The boyfriend simply told her to give up, took the phone and approached a homeless man. They were shocked by the scene before them. This time, the boyfriend was convinced. But the question is, have they ever been in a relationship?
